CHG_001.short_description: Apply Oracle Patch 19.4.2 to SAP DB
CHG_001.description: Applying critical vendor patch to fix memory leak ORA-04030.
CHG_001.implementation_plan: 1. Stop SAP Services. 2. Apply DB Patch. 3. Restart DB. 4. Start SAP.
CHG_001.testing_plan: Verify user login and transaction creation in QA first.

CHG_002.short_description: Replace Line Card on Core Switch
CHG_002.description: Replacing faulty ASIC line card in slot 1.
CHG_002.implementation_plan: Hot swap card during maintenance window.
CHG_002.testing_plan: Check interface status and error counters.

CHG_003.description: Rolling back firmware to v4.0 to restore production.

CHG_005.description: Upgrade Cisco ASA to mitigate CVE-2025-999.
CHG_005.implementation_plan: Upload image to standby unit, failover, upgrade primary.
CHG_005.testing_plan: Test VPN connection from external network.

CHG_007.description: Upsizing instances due to high load.

CHG_008.description: Cable management is messy, airflow restricted.
CHG_008.implementation_plan: Unplug and re-route cables one by one.

CHG_009.implementation_plan: Power off, remove from rack, wipe disks.

CHG_010.description: Allow IP range for new marketing vendor.

CHG_011.close_notes: Firmware corrupted boot sector. Caused outage.

CHG_012.short_description: Install Beta Driver on Print Server
CHG_012.close_notes: CAB rejected beta software in production.

CHG_013.close_notes: Conflict with legacy app detected during assess.

CHG_014.description: Restoring data due to corruption incident.

CHG_022.short_description: Replace UPS Battery in Server Room

CHG_025.close_notes: Update worked but took longer than expected.

INC_001.description: Oracle DB not responding. Major outage declared.

INC_011.description: User receiving Error 403 Forbidden when accessing Sales Leads module.
INC_011.worknotes: Verified permissions. User was missing Sales_Rep role in AD.

INC_013.worknotes: Waiting for user to bring device in.

TMPL_001.name: Password Reset Request
TMPL_001.short_description: Unable to login - Password Reset needed

TMPL_002.name: VPN Connection Failure
TMPL_002.short_description: VPN connection drops or fails to connect

TMPL_003.name: Printer Jam / Failure
TMPL_003.short_description: Office printer is jammed or not responding

TMPL_004.name: Outlook Not Syncing
TMPL_004.short_description: Outlook client is not receiving new emails

TMPL_007.name: Account Locked Out
TMPL_007.short_description: User account is locked due to failed attempts

TMPL_008.name: Cannot Connect to WiFi
TMPL_008.short_description: Unable to join the corporate WiFi network

TMPL_010.name: SAP Login Error
TMPL_010.short_description: Error code displayed when logging into SAP

KB_001.title: Self-Service Password Reset
KB_001.body: Go to the portal and click Forgot Password. You will need your MFA token.

KB_002.title: Setting up MFA on iOS
KB_002.body: Install the App. Scan QR Code. Enter 6 digit pin.

KB_003.title: VPN Error 412 Fix
KB_003.body: Error 412 indicates a timeout. Restart the Cisco AnyConnect client.

KB_004.title: Account Locked Policy
KB_004.body: Accounts lock after 3 failed attempts. Wait 15 minutes or call Service Desk.

KB_005.title: Requesting Admin Rights
KB_005.body: Admin rights are restricted. Submit request form SR-099 via portal.

KB_006.title: SAP Login "Session Locked"
KB_006.body: If your session is locked, ask a colleague to use T-Code SM04 to kill it.

KB_007.title: Outlook Sync Issues
KB_007.body: If Outlook is not syncing, remove the account and re-add using Modern Auth.

KB_008.title: Zoom Audio Not Working
KB_008.body: Check Windows Sound Settings. Ensure input is set to "Headset Microphone".

KB_009.title: Salesforce "Insufficient Privileges"
KB_009.body: User likely needs the "Sales_Standard" permission set added to their profile.

KB_010.title: Adobe License Expiry Warning
KB_010.body: This is a known bug. Sign out of Creative Cloud and Sign back in to refresh token.

KB_011.title: Excel "Macros Disabled"
KB_011.body: Macros are disabled by default. Move file to a Trusted Location to enable.

KB_012.title: Bitlocker Recovery Key
KB_012.body: Agents:Retrieve key from AD Computer Object properties tab.

KB_013.title: Printer Jam - Tray 2
KB_013.body: Tray 2 sensors get dusty. Open tray, wipe roller, restart printer.

KB_014.title: Docking Station Monitors Blank
KB_014.body: Unplug the USB-C cable. Power cycle the dock. Reconnect.

KB_015.title: Desk Phone Static
KB_015.body: Try replacing the ethernet cable. If persists, replace handset cord.

KB_016.title: Battery Swelling Policy
KB_016.body: If laptop trackpad is lifted, battery is swelling. STOP USE IMMEDIATELY.

KB_017.title: Guest WiFi Access
KB_017.body: SSID:ACME-Guest. No password required, must accept splash page terms.

KB_018.title: Slow Internet in Building B
KB_018.body: We are aware of interference on the 2nd floor. Engineering is investigating.

KB_019.title: Whitelisting URLs
KB_019.body: To request a website unblock, submit ticket with category "Network".

KB_020.title: Windows 11 Upgrade FAQ
KB_020.body: Drafting common questions for next months rollout.

KB_021.title: Legacy Dial-Up Numbers
KB_021.body: List of numbers for the old modem pool.

KB_023.title: New HR Portal Guide
KB_023.body: Walkthrough of the new Workday UI.

KB_024.title: Conference Room Display Help
KB_024.body: Ensure TV is on Input 1. Check HDMI cable is secure.

NOTIF_004.message: Your issue regarding the Printer Jam has been resolved. Resolution:Cleared paper tray.

NOTIF_006.message: The Access Point was rebooted. Signal should be restored.

NOTIF_019.message: Your account is currently locked. Security team is verifying.

NOTIF_023.message: We are aware of the outage at your location.

PRB_001.problem_statement: Recurring instability in SAP Oracle Database
PRB_001.worknotes: Logs indicate ORA-04030 out of process memory error.
PRB_001.workaround: Restart the Oracle Service every 24 hours until patch applied.
PRB_001.fix_notes: Vendor patch 19.4.2 required. Change Request CHG001 created.

PRB_002.problem_statement: Core Switch Port 24 Flapping impacting HQ

PRB_003.worknotes: Vendor logs show buffer overflow in motion controller.

PRB_004.problem_statement: Multiple reports of Dell Latitude battery swelling
PRB_004.worknotes: Checking serial numbers against vendor recall list.

PRB_005.worknotes: Token lifetime policy was set too short.
PRB_005.fix_notes: Updated Azure AD Token Lifetime policy to 90 days.

PRB_006.problem_statement: Intermittent VPN Drops for East Coast
PRB_006.worknotes: Packet loss detected at ISP hop.

PRB_007.worknotes: Defender scan overlapped with Backup window.

PRB_008.problem_statement: Conf Room Projectors reaching lamp life limit
